notes: Wave10 defines camera/lens/framing/depth contracts and validation gates.
The current Main Flow image canvas has fixed latent sizes and staged reference/control branches.
The current Main Flow does not prove all camera plans visually; runtime image evidence is required for promotion.
Video/audio remain in scope; video camera motion and audio perspective require separate runtime proof.
non_blocking_notes: Earlier validation subprocesses emitted spreadsheet-runtime warmup stderr from the environment; this did not affect package validation.
Existing older scripts may emit Python SyntaxWarning messages about Windows backslashes in docstrings/comments; syntax validation passes.
